#include "dictionary.h"

namespace seneca {

	Dictionary::Dictionary() {}

	Dictionary::Dictionary(const char* filename) {

		std::ifstream file;
		std::string line;

		file.open(filename, std::ios::in);

		if (file.is_open()) {

			/* string lib getline, count total lines (or words for the array) */
			while (getline(file, line, '\n'))
				++m_dictioSize;

			file.clear();
			file.seekg(0);

			/* Allocate array and values in it */
			m_dictioArr = new Word[m_dictioSize];

			for (unsigned int i = 0; i < m_dictioSize; i++) {

				/* Reading m_word */
				getline(file, m_dictioArr[i].m_word, ',');

				/* Reading m_pos */
				getline(file, line, ',');
				m_dictioArr[i].m_pos = stringToPos(line);
				m_dictioArr[i].m_phrasePos = line;


				/* Reading m_definition*/
				getline(file, m_dictioArr[i].m_definition, '\n');

			}

			file.close();
		}
		else {		// if file did not open, empty state
		
			m_dictioArr = nullptr;
			m_dictioSize = 0;
		}
	}

	void Dictionary::searchWord(const char* word) {

		unsigned int i = 0;
		unsigned int firstDef = 0;
		int lengthWord = strlen(word);
		bool flag = false;
		using namespace std;

		for (i = 0; i < m_dictioSize; i++) {

			/* Word found */
			if (strcmp(word, m_dictioArr[i].m_word.c_str()) == 0) {

				++firstDef;

				if (firstDef == 1) {
					/* this is FIRST DEFINITION */
					cout << m_dictioArr[i].m_word << " - ";
				}

				if (flag) {
					cout << std::string(lengthWord, ' ') << " - ";
				}
				/* Print POS only if conditions met */
				if (g_settings.m_verbose && m_dictioArr[i].m_pos != PartOfSpeech::Unknown) {

					
					cout << "(" << posToString(m_dictioArr[i].m_pos) << ") ";
				}

				/* Print definition */
				cout << m_dictioArr[i].m_definition << endl;


				/* MORE DEFINITIONS PRINTED IF CONDITION MET */
				if (g_settings.m_show_all != false) {
					
					flag = true;
					continue;
				}
				else
					break;	// Break loop after first word
			}
		}

		if (firstDef == 0)
			cout << "Word '" << word << "' was not found in the dictionary." << endl;
	}

	PartOfSpeech Dictionary::stringToPos(const std::string& pos) {

		if (pos == "n." || pos == "n. pl.") return PartOfSpeech::Noun;

		if (pos == "adv.") return PartOfSpeech::Adverb;

		if (pos == "a.") return PartOfSpeech::Adjective;

		if (pos == "v." || pos == "v. i." || pos == "v. t." || pos == "v. t. & i.") 
			return PartOfSpeech::Verb;

		if (pos == "prep.") return PartOfSpeech::Preposition;

		if (pos == "pron.") return PartOfSpeech::Pronoun;

		if (pos == "conj.") return PartOfSpeech::Conjunction;

		if (pos == "interj.") return PartOfSpeech::Interjection;

		return PartOfSpeech::Unknown;
	}

	std::string Dictionary::posToString(const PartOfSpeech pos) {

		switch (pos) {
		
		case PartOfSpeech::Noun: return "noun";

		case PartOfSpeech::Pronoun: return "pronoun";

		case PartOfSpeech::Adjective: return "adjective";

		case PartOfSpeech::Adverb: return "adverb";

		case PartOfSpeech::Verb: return "verb";

		case PartOfSpeech::Preposition: return "preposition";

		case PartOfSpeech::Conjunction: return "conjunction";

		case PartOfSpeech::Interjection: return "interjection";

		default: return "unknown";
		}
	}

	Dictionary& Dictionary::operator=(Dictionary&& src) noexcept {
	    if (this != &src) {
	        delete[] m_dictioArr;
	        m_dictioArr = src.m_dictioArr;
	        m_dictioSize = src.m_dictioSize;
	        src.m_dictioArr = nullptr;
	        src.m_dictioSize = 0;
	    }
	    return *this;
	}

	Dictionary::Dictionary(Dictionary&& src) noexcept {
	    m_dictioArr = src.m_dictioArr;
	    m_dictioSize = src.m_dictioSize;
	    src.m_dictioArr = nullptr;
	    src.m_dictioSize = 0;
	}

	Dictionary::Dictionary(const Dictionary& src) {

		*this = src;
    }

	Dictionary& Dictionary::operator=(const Dictionary& src) {

		if (this != &src) {
			delete[] m_dictioArr;
			m_dictioArr = nullptr;
			m_dictioSize = 0;
			if (src.m_dictioArr && src.m_dictioSize > 0) {
				m_dictioSize = src.m_dictioSize;
				m_dictioArr = new Word[m_dictioSize];
				for (unsigned int i = 0; i < m_dictioSize; ++i) {
					m_dictioArr[i] = src.m_dictioArr[i];
				}
			}
		}
		return *this;

	}

	Dictionary::~Dictionary() {
	    delete[] m_dictioArr;
	}

}	// namespace seneca
